case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. NYREE GALLARDO-HOTCHKISS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-19-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEANNETTE BRYANT, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
